Event.name: Small Teams Tournament
Event.description: Up to 8 teams of 8 skaters (co-ed welcome). Short, intense 20-minute bouts. Smaller leagues get priority — this is a learning tournament.

Teams.title: Teams
Teams.subtitle: Up to 8 teams of 8 skaters. Tap a team for the full roster.
Teams.empty: Teams will be announced from July 2026 — check back soon!
Teams.rosterEmpty: The roster hasn't been published yet.

Schema.title: Schedule
Schema.subtitle: 20-minute bouts, no halftime — listen for the whistle!
Schema.empty: The schedule will be published soon.

Bingo.title: Derby Bingo
Bingo.subtitle: Check squares while you watch. 5 in a row = BINGO! Your progress stays on this device.
Bingo.notEnough: Not enough bingo prompts to generate a card yet.

Photos.title: Photos
Photos.subtitle: Share your best derby moment. Every photo shows up in the gallery right away.
Photos.empty: No photos yet — be the first!

Mvp.title: MVP / Best Jammer
Mvp.subtitle: Vote per finished bout for the skater who impressed you most.
Mvp.noFinished: No finished bouts to vote on yet.
Mvp.matchWithoutPlayers: No skaters registered for this bout.

Nickname.title: Derby name roller
Nickname.subtitle: No derby name yet? No worries — tap and the roller derby gods decide your fate.
Nickname.clickMe: Tap here for your derby name

Rules.title: Rules & house rules
Rules.intro1: Two teams of 5 skaters race on an oval track. Each jam (max 2 minutes) the jammer — marked by a star on the helmet — tries to lap as many opponents as possible. Every opponent passed = 1 point.
Rules.intro2: The blockers stop the opposing jammer and help their own jammer through. The pivot (stripe on the helmet) can take over the jammer role mid-jam via a star pass.
Rules.intro3: Illegal hits, back blocks, trips or out-of-bounds plays → penalty: 30 seconds in the penalty box. Four penalties in one jam and the team plays short.
Rules.intro4: Official ruleset: WFTDA Rules of Flat Track Roller Derby. This tournament runs 20-minute bouts (no halftime) — a shorter format than the regular 60-minute game.
Rules.houseDefault1: Respect skaters, officials and the audience.
Rules.houseDefault2: No food or drinks in the hall except water in a closable bottle.
Rules.houseDefault3: Keep bags out of the track-side area — use the locker rooms.
Rules.houseDefault5: First aid or questions? Head to the organizer's table by the entrance.

Venue.title: Venue & info
Venue.foodBody: The sports hall has a canteen with coffee, soft drinks, snacks and treats. Inside the playing area only water (closable bottle).
Venue.firstAidBody: The first aid post is marked with a green cross near the entrance. In an emergency head to the organizer's table.
Venue.changingBody: There are gendered and gender-neutral locker rooms. Valuables? Lock them up — organizers aren't responsible.
Venue.parkingBody: Free parking around the venue. From Nijmegen Central Station take bus 6 towards Weezenhof, stop Horstacker.
Venue.sponsorsBody: This tournament is supported by our sponsors. Logos follow closer to the event date.

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Turn on notifications so you don't miss anything on the day: "bout starting soon", results, photo contest winner and more.
Notifications.tip: Tip: add this app to your home screen for the best experience. On iPhone: Safari → Share → "Add to Home Screen". On Android: Chrome menu → "Install app".
Notifications.unsupported: Your browser doesn't support push notifications. Use Chrome, Firefox or Safari 16+.
Notifications.denied: Notifications are blocked. Enable them in your browser settings and reload this page.

Meta.description: Everything about the Roadkill Rollers Nijmegen Small Teams Tournament on November 21, 2026 — teams, schedule, bingo, photos and more.
